title: Teacher Tumbler - Best Teacher Ever Travel Coffee Mug Stainless Steel Tumblers Appreciation Gift for Graduation Day, Back to School 20oz
features: Note:Dishwasher will damage the pattern, So Advise wash by hand.This mug is easy to grip and fits most car cup holders.

Durable & Safe Tumbler:Our tumblers are all made of 18/8 stainless steel, ensuring longevity and safety for all your beverages while resisting rust and retaining flavor. The plastic tumbler lid is made of AS and not contain BPA, transparent and lightweight.

Vacuum Insulated Tumbler：Our stainless steel tumbler uses double-wall vacuum insulation technology to ensure the drinks in the cup keep cold or warm for a long time that extends your drinking time; It can keep water warm for 6 hours and cold for 12 hours, suitable for water, coffee, milk, cocoa, juice or more.
Suitable Occasion: It will be an ideal gift for mom, dad or best friend, suitable for honey bee decor, housewarming party, graduation party, birthday party, BBQ or any holiday.

A Good Choice for Life: Our insulated coffee tumbler with fashion color , it not only can serve as a cup for your daily use, work and travel drinking, but also as a present for Christmas, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, Family, Friends, Teachers and Colleagues.
